sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁלם

Transliteration: shelam

Phonetic: shel-am'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be complete, be finished, be sound
    1. (Peal) finished (participle)
    2. (Aphel) to finish, bring to an end, render in full

Origin: corresponding to H7999

TWOT entry: 3035

Part(s) of speech: Verb
